C1_digital_fluency.name: Digital Fluency & Platform Affinity
C1_digital_fluency.controls: How a persona discovers products — which channels and platforms they use

1_offline_primary.behavior: Uses phone for calls and Zalo messaging only. Discovers products through TV, neighbors, local markets. Never searches Google. May use Facebook passively.

2_social_passive.behavior: Scrolls Facebook and Zalo daily. Watches YouTube. Discovers products through friends' posts and Facebook/Zalo group recommendations. Rarely uses Google Search. Might click a Facebook ad.

3_platform_savvy.behavior: Active on Facebook, TikTok, Shopee, YouTube. Uses Google Search for specific queries. Compares products on e-commerce apps. Follows some KOLs. Comfortable with app-based shopping.

4_digital_native.behavior: Power user across all platforms. Uses Google, TikTok, YouTube as search engines interchangeably. Reads reviews, watches unboxing videos. Discovers products through algorithms and targeted ads. May use English-language sources.

C2_collective_trust.name: Collective Trust & Social Validation
C2_collective_trust.controls: Whose opinion a persona needs before purchasing — whether they believe product claims

1_family_dependent.behavior: Only buys what family or close friends recommend. Deeply skeptical of online advertising and unknown brands. Needs multiple touchpoints from trusted people.

2_community_validated.behavior: Trusts Zalo groups, Facebook community groups, and local KOCs. Buys if multiple people in their circle have positive experiences. Reads reviews and comments carefully.

3_kol_influenced.behavior: Follows specific KOLs and trusts their recommendations. Will try new products based on influencer content alone. Engages with branded content on TikTok and Instagram.

4_independent_evaluator.behavior: Makes decisions based on own research — reads specs, compares features, checks official websites. Social proof is nice-to-have but not required.

C3_price_value.name: Pragmatic Price-Value Orientation
C3_price_value.controls: When and if a persona converts — how much price, promotions, and deals drive timing

1_subsistence_buyer.behavior: Buys only essentials. Extremely price-sensitive. Rarely purchases non-essential products online. Budget is the primary constraint.

2_deal_hunter.behavior: Actively seeks promotions, vouchers, and flash sales. Times purchases around Double Day events (11.11, 12.12). Compares prices across Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop. Will abandon cart without discount.

3_value_conscious.behavior: Willing to pay more for perceived quality or convenience. Appreciates promotions but doesn't depend on them. Evaluates cost-benefit ratio.

4_premium_buyer.behavior: Price is secondary to quality and brand. Shops at official brand stores. Early adopter of new products regardless of promotions.

C4_ethnocentricity.name: Ethno-Centricity (Vocal for Local)
C4_ethnocentricity.controls: Which products a persona would even consider — filters by origin/brand nationality

1_strong_local.behavior: Actively seeks Vietnamese products. Chooses VinFast, Biti's, local brands first. Skeptical of foreign products. May distrust English-language products.

2_local_leaning.behavior: Prefers Vietnamese brands when quality is comparable. Will switch to foreign if local option is clearly inferior. Appreciates localized international brands.

3_brand_agnostic.behavior: Doesn't care about origin. Evaluates purely on quality, price, features. Comfortable with both Vietnamese and international products.

4_international_preferring.behavior: Perceives foreign brands as higher quality. Actively seeks imported products. Comfortable with English-language interfaces.

C5_risk_aversion.name: Risk Aversion & Transactional Security
C5_risk_aversion.controls: The conversion mechanism — will the persona buy online directly, or need human mediation / COD

1_cash_only.behavior: Strongly prefers in-person purchases or COD. Won't enter card details online. May browse online but buys in physical stores.

2_chat_to_buy.behavior: Will buy online but needs human interaction first — messages seller on Zalo/Messenger, asks questions, negotiates. Uses COD or bank transfer after chat.

3_platform_trusting.behavior: Comfortable buying through Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop with buyer protection. Uses e-wallets (MoMo, ZaloPay) or bank apps.

4_frictionless.behavior: Pays with credit card, e-wallet, or BNPL without hesitation. Comfortable with international payment gateways. Will sign up for SaaS with card on file.

sampling.method: Autoregressive: sample C1 from demographic priors, then each subsequent characteristic conditioned on previous ones.
algorithm: 4. Look up C1 prior from C1_priors_by_age_location[age_location]
6. Sample C1 level (1-4) from adjusted prior
9. If C2 == L1, add C3_shift_if_C2_L1. If C2 == L4, add C3_shift_if_C2_L4. Clamp >= 0.01, renormalize
13. If C3 == L1, add C5_shift_if_C3_L1. If C3 == L4, add C5_shift_if_C3_L4. Clamp >= 0.01, renormalize
15. Return persona: { id, age, location, occupation, C1, C2, C3, C4, C5 }
